name: CMS122 — Diabetes HbA1c Sample
description: Sample patients used to evaluate CMS122v11 Diabetes Hemoglobin A1c Poor Control. Includes qualifying (poor and good control), non-qualifying (no HbA1c), and missing-encounter scenarios.

name: CMS165 — Hypertension BP Control Sample
description: Sample patients used to evaluate CMS165v9 Controlling High Blood Pressure. Includes controlled, uncontrolled, no-BP, and missing-demographics scenarios.

name: ePC02 — Severe Obstetric Complications Sample
description: Sample inpatient delivery encounters used to evaluate ePC02 severe obstetric complications.

name: MSSP APP Plus Demonstration
description: Combined cohort spanning all three sample measure populations for end-to-end MSSP APP Plus reporting demonstrations.
